title: Edoardo Scotti's Departure from Television and Venture into Artificial Intelligence
description: Edoardo Scotti, the only son of Gerry Scotti, has left television to focus on artificial intelligence, according to various Italian news sources.

sources.title: Edoardo Scotti, figlio unico di Gerry: «Oggettivamente è bravo. In camerino vuole riso in bianco, io con i suoi meme ho fondato un'azienda di intelligenza artificiale»
​Edoardo Scotti lascia la televisione e punta sull’intelligenza artificiale
Chi è Edoardo, il figlio di Gerry Scotti che lo ha reso nonno tre volte (con la moglie Ginevra)

sections.heading: Background
paragraphs: Edoardo Scotti, known for his connection to Gerry Scotti, has made headlines with his career shift from television to artificial intelligence.

sections.heading: Career Shift
paragraphs: According to 'Corriere Milano', Edoardo Scotti has left the television industry, citing a desire for 'riso in bianco' (plain rice) in the dressing room, a metaphor for a simpler or more straightforward career. 'Il Mattino' reports that he is now focusing on artificial intelligence, a field that has seen significant growth and interest in recent years.

sections.heading: Artificial Intelligence Venture
paragraphs: 'Corriere Milano' mentions that Edoardo Scotti has used his father's memes to found an artificial intelligence company. This venture into tech highlights a new direction for someone known for their work in entertainment.

sections.heading: Personal Life
paragraphs: ELLE provides insight into Edoardo Scotti's personal life, noting that he is the son of Gerry Scotti and has become a grandfather three times over with his wife Ginevra.

faq.q: Why did Edoardo Scotti leave television?
faq.a: Edoardo Scotti reportedly left television seeking a simpler lifestyle, as indicated by his desire for 'riso in bianco' in the dressing room, according to 'Corriere Milano'.

faq.q: What is Edoardo Scotti's new venture?
faq.a: Edoardo Scotti has ventured into artificial intelligence, founding a company in this field, as reported by 'Corriere Milano'.

faq.q: How is Edoardo Scotti related to Gerry Scotti?
faq.a: Edoardo Scotti is the only son of Gerry Scotti, as mentioned by 'ELLE'.
